description: CompositionFuchsia tennis skirt made of Dri-Fit polyester with in-built shorts, white border at the hem, soft elastane waist band, slits at the sides and nike heat transfer swooshFittingSlimWash careMachine wash cold with like colours Do not use softeners Remove immediately Do not allow to lay on itself when wet Do not bleach Tumble dry low Do not iron Do not dry clean At the court, on the beach or simply enjoying those healthy runs, there's no better way to do it than in this nike tennis skirt. Smart to look at, and engineered with Dry-Fit technology to ensure you stay dry and fresh all day, there's nothing better an active woman can ask for. Pair it with vests or singlet and sports shoes to complete that uber cool look.
